name: cherrytodo
description: 🍒 CherryTodo - A tiny floating retro to-do bookmark that lives on the edge of your screen
author: cacheton code

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.build:win: npm run icon && npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.build:mac: npm run icon && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.build:dir: npm run icon && npm run build && electron-builder --dir --config electron-builder.yml
